label: Discrete mathematics & logic

node.label: Discrete mathematics & logic
node.definition: Sets, relations, combinatorics, propositional logic, and proof systems underpin algorithms and symbolic reasoning.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Discrete mathematics & logic is modeled as an upstream prerequisite for downstream nodes such as Algorithms & data structures, Complexity & computability, Graph theory.
examples: atlas downstream link to Algorithms & data structures
atlas downstream link to Complexity & computability
atlas downstream link to Graph theory
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.
